messages.text: the margarita nodded, said i was right
it only salutes women in blue and chaos earrings
chaos earrings is wild, they pay your bills too
not yet, but they raised my standards instantly
crazy, one drink and u grew preferences
step one, girl who makes furniture feel basic
ur game looking very preseason tho
fair, still stretching, crowd already booing me
crowd just wants you to pass the drink
you got a whole origin story in one glass
fine, director, enjoy the trailer from instagram
drinks wednesday. you're gonna love this place
